### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Testing\.Assertions](Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Assertions.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Testing\.Assertions')

## StorageKeyIsolationAssertions Class

Static assertion helpers for verifying storage key isolation between tenants\.
These are test\-only utilities \-\- NOT production runtime guards\.
Isolation is guaranteed by construction \(AggregateIdentity validation\), not by runtime checking\.

```csharp
public static class StorageKeyIsolationAssertions
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; StorageKeyIsolationAssertions

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Assertions.StorageKeyIsolationAssertions.AssertEventStreamKey(string,Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity)'></a>

## StorageKeyIsolationAssertions\.AssertEventStreamKey\(string, AggregateIdentity\) Method

Validates that a full event stream key matches the expected structure derived from the given identity\.
Verifies the key matches the pattern: \{tenant\}:\{domain\}:\{aggId\}:events:\{seq\}\.

```csharp
public static void AssertEventStreamKey(string key, Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity identity);
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Assertions.StorageKeyIsolationAssertions.AssertKeysDisjoint(string,string)'></a>

## StorageKeyIsolationAssertions\.AssertKeysDisjoint\(string, string\) Method

Asserts that two keys are structurally disjoint \-\- they share no common prefix up to the first segment \(tenant\)\.
Two keys are disjoint if their first colon\-delimited segment differs\.

```csharp
public static void AssertKeysDisjoint(string keyA, string keyB);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Assertions.StorageKeyIsolationAssertions.AssertKeysDisjoint(string,string).keyA'></a>

The first key\.

`keyB` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')
